prompt.content:
Make the following changes to the RMBS vs ONTO analysis in the model
1.	Update the % cash consideration to 20%
2.	Update the % Bid Premium to 5%
3.	Update the % SG&A Synergies to 50%
4.	Adjust ONTO’s share price prior to acquisition such that its implied EV/Sales multiple is equal to the average EV/Sales multiple of the following peers; KLAC, NVMI and CAMT. Use their enterprise value and TTM Revenue as of September 30, 2025 for the computation
5.	Calculate the following
i.	% Value Accretion/(Dilution) to RMBS shareholders
ii.	% Value Accretion/(Dilution) to ONTO shareholders
Report both values in % and to two decimal places.

rubrics.name: States the % Value Accretion/(Dilution) to RMBS Shareholders is 12.72%... (ver_b143fad3d7944ffcb511f1ae4869c190)

messages.content: States the % Value Accretion/(Dilution) to RMBS Shareholders is 12.72% (acceptable range 12.59% to 12.85%).

rubrics.name: States the % Value Accretion/(Dilution) to ONTO Shareholders is 15.69%... (ver_196fe0a2900742ddb29aeaa0ec7f4446)

messages.content: States the % Value Accretion/(Dilution) to ONTO Shareholders is 15.69% (acceptable range 15.53% to 15.85%).

golden_responses.golden_text_response:
% Value Accretion/(Dilution) to RMBS Shareholders: 12.72%
% Value Accretion/(Dilution) to ONTO Shareholders: 15.69%
